message:
feat(mission): control-loop engine with cadence, triggers, and full planner pipeline (ft-1i2ge.3.1)

MissionLoop orchestrates: readiness → features → scoring → solving.
Caller-driven via tick()/trigger()/evaluate(). Supports cadence-based
evaluation, event batching, and full decision tracing with extraction
and scorer summaries. 22 unit tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
